memory.summary: I'm tempted to take this easy win, but my relationships and long-term project success demand I prioritize the team over immediate leisure.

desires: Secure the trust of cohort_3 by refusing to abandon the term project for a trivial, instant win
Protect my long-term academic standing and future payoff by investing time in the soft-difficulty term project despite its low immediate urgency

goals.description: Initiate deep work on the term project with cohort_3 to ensure collective success and solidify our long-term academic standing.
goals.rationale: My value of 'relationships' (0.5) outweighs immediate gratification. Abandoning the team for a trivial chore would breach trust with cohort_3. I must assertively commit to the hard path now to secure future payoff, adhering to my long planning horizon.

goals.description: Defer the quick_chore and the leisure_now option until after securing a significant milestone in the term project.
goals.rationale: While the chore offers an instant win, my deliberate nature dictates that I invest time where it compounds. I will not let low-urgency tasks fragment my focus or signal a lack of commitment to my teammates.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances the term project to secure our collective standing (Relationships priority). I defer the chore and leisure; my deliberate nature requires investing now for future payoff rather than accepting trivial instant wins that would fragment focus.
